headline: Robinhood explores first credit card-backed bond sale - report
summary: Investing.com -- Robinhood Markets Inc. is measuring investor interest in a bond backed by bills from its branded consumer credit cards, marking what would be the company's first such offering, according to a Bloomberg report Monday.

headline: HealthTrust Honors Supplier Partners for Driving Innovation, Value and Performance in 2026
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., July 13, 2026--HealthTrust Performance Group™ (HealthTrust) today announced AirLife®, Philips, American Express and CSL Behring as recipients of its 2026 Supplier of the Year Awards. A presentation of the awards will take place at the annual HealthTrust University Conference (HTU) on July 21 in Denver, Colorado. As part of efforts to make missions possible for health systems, the awards acknowledge the outstanding support, service and value supplier partners deliver to HealthTr

headline: JPMorgan Upgrades American Express Despite Rising Geopolitical Risks (AXP)
summary: American Express Earns UpgradeJPMorgan has upgraded American Express (NYSE:AXP) to Overweight in its second-quarter consumer finance outlook, identifying the company as its preferred name in the sector despite mounting geopolitical and economic uncertainty. American Express shares rose around 1% in premarket trading following the analyst upgrade.

headline: JPMorgan lifts American Express rating as sector faces geopolitical headwinds
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan has upgraded American Express to Overweight as part of its second-quarter consumer finance preview, even as the bank struck a cautious tone on the broader sector amid renewed U.S.-Iran conflict and a deteriorating macro backdrop.

headline: Amex Gold Mining Retains CMAC-Thyssen Mining Group for Underground Development of Perron Bulk Sample Program
summary: Montreal, Quebec--(Newsfile Corp. - July 13, 2026) - Amex Gold Mining Inc. (TSXV: AMX) (FSE: MX0) (OTCQX: AMXEF) ("Amex" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that it has retained CMAC-Thyssen Mining Group ("CMAC") as the underground mining contractor for the Company's 40,000-tonne bulk sample program at its wholly-owned Perron Gold Project in northwestern Québec.The appointment represents another important milestone in the advancement of the Perron Gold Project as the Company transitions...
